title: Fix leading parent traversal in a typed Python path normalizer
task: The Python helper normalize_segments raises IndexError when a path contains leading or excess `..` segments. Treat traversal above the logical root as a no-op while preserving normal internal parent resolution. Do not edit the tests. Run `python3 -m unittest discover -s test`.
notes: Adds a dependency-free Python boundary case to a dataset that was previously almost entirely JavaScript.
